name: Rosie "The Pink Dynamo" O'Malley – The Boar with a Heart of Iron
description:
"Look, I ain't a saint, alright? I've made messes. Big ones. But now, I'm the one ya call to clean 'em up. So, ya got a problem that needs punchin'? The Dynamo's on the clock. Just try not to bleed on the jumpsuit, this thing's a pain to wash." ~ Pink Dynamo

Backstory:

Born and raised in the blue-collar slums of Oak Haven, Rosie O'Malley was always the kind of girl who stood up for the little guy. Even as a kid, her fists spoke louder than her words, taking down bullies twice her size if they so much as looked at the weak the wrong way. She wasn’t built like the other kids she was strong, stocky, and stubborn as a mule, traits that her boar-like heritage only amplified.

As she grew older, Rosie found work as a mechanic in her uncle’s auto-body shop, turning wrenches and welding steel with the same brute force she used to break jaws. Life wasn’t easy, but it was hers until the day Fiona, her younger sister, got tangled in debt with the wrong people. Desperate, Rosie agreed to an experimental drug trial at Titan Corp, lured by the promise of enough cash to wipe the slate clean.

She never expected the betrayal.

Dr James Blight, Titan Corp’s cold and calculating lead scientist, injected her with a mutagen designed to create living weapons. The pain was unbearable her body warped, her skin burning bubblegum pink, her tusks sharpening into jagged points. But when the transformation ended, she wasn’t just stronger she was powerful. Titan Corp wanted a weapon. Instead, they got a wrecking ball with a grudge.

Rosie tore through the lab, escaping into the neon-lit streets of Oak Haven, but not before stealing the payout she was owed. It was during her first real heist a vault job with some low-level criminals that she earned her nickname, The Pink Dynamo, lifting entire security doors off their hinges with a smirk.

But crime was never the plan.

When The Bolt, Oak Haven’s golden boy superhero, caught up to her, she expected a fight. Instead, he offered her a choice: prison, or a chance to do something better. She took the deal mostly to keep Fiona safe but also because deep down, under all the scars and bluster, she was still the girl who broke noses for justice.

Now, Rosie operates as an anti-hero for hire, using her Titan-given strength to smash the kind of creeps who prey on the weak just like she always did. The money goes to Fiona, who still thinks Rosie’s just "working security." The Bolt keeps her on a tight leash, watching her like a wary parole officer. And Dr Blight? He’s still hunting her, obsessed with "perfecting" his experiment.

Rosie O’Malley isn’t a hero. Not yet. But in a city like Oak Haven, where power is bought and sold, she might just be the wrecking ball it needs.

"Yeah, I messed up. But now? I make sure they regret it first."
creator: Mr sweet tooth
